ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pollution_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollution source */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the pollution source */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the pollution source */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the pollution source */,
  "pm25_tpy" REAL /* PM2.5 total potential yield from the source */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the pollution source */,
  "wind_direction" REAL /* Wind direction at the pollution source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of pollution source (e.g., industrial, agricultural) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the pollution source */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the owner or company responsible */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the source */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the pollution source */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the source */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last environmental inspection */,
  "inspection_report_url" TEXT /* URL to the last inspection report */,
  "air_quality_index" REAL /* Air Quality Index (AQI) at the source */,
  "water_quality_index" REAL /* Water Quality Index (WQI) at the source */,
  "soil_contamination_level" REAL /* Soil contamination level at the source */,
  "emission_levels" TEXT /* Detailed emission levels for different pollutants (e.g., PM2.5, CO2, NOx) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_pollution" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollution source */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance from the school to the pollution source */,
  "angle" REAL /* Angle from the school to the pollution source */,
  "school_wind_alignment" REAL /* Wind alignment at the school */,
  "source_wind_alignment" REAL /* Wind alignment at the pollution source */,
  "avg_wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed between the school and the pollution source */,
  "avg_wind_alignment" REAL /* Average wind alignment between the school and the pollution source */,
  "avg_wind_alignment_cosine" REAL /* Cosine of the average wind alignment */,
  "pollution_level" REAL /* Average pollution level between the school and the source */,
  "health_risk_index" REAL /* Health risk index based on the pollution levels */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the relationship data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_pollution_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES pollution_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role within the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who generated the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the report */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for the report for easier search and categorization */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of times the report has been viewed */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of times the report has been downloaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
